name: Foundation
intent: Build the minimal foundation for sequential workflow execution with typed data flow — enough to parse specs, validate schemas, dispatch subprocesses, resolve expressions, persist state, and show TUI progress.

success_criteria.criterion: Workflow spec parsing from YAML produces valid WorkflowSpec
AJV validates input against workflow input schema
Sequential steps execute as pi subprocesses
Step outputs are named and accessible to downstream steps
State persisted to disk after each step
TUI progress widget displays during execution

specs.name: Types and Schema Validation
specs.intent: Define core interfaces and AJV validation wrapper
acceptance_criteria: WorkflowSpec, StepSpec, StepResult, WorkflowResult types defined
validate() and validateFromFile() work with AJV

specs.name: Subprocess Dispatch
specs.intent: Spawn pi --mode json with model override, tool filtering, session capture
acceptance_criteria: Output extracted from last assistant message

specs.name: State Persistence and TUI
specs.intent: Run directory management, atomic state writes, progress widget
acceptance_criteria: Run directory created with sessions/ and outputs/
Widget renders step status and timing

specs.name: Workflow Executor
specs.intent: Main orchestration loop connecting all modules

specs.name: Extension Entry Point and Demo
specs.intent: Register tool, commands, and provide working demo
